description: Curated gold-standard relevance set for offline search-quality evaluation. relevantUids are PubMed IDs (no prefix), each verified against the live NCBI esummary API on 2026-07-02 to confirm the PMID resolves to the intended landmark trial/guideline/meta-analysis. requiredTypes use lowercase substrings matched against article pubtype/studyDesign. offTopicUids are intentionally empty; populate them from live search results the team agrees are irrelevant (an empty set scores off-topic-rate 0, which is safe for the pass gate). Run with: npm run eval:search-quality:gold

queries.query: SGLT2 inhibitors heart failure reduced ejection fraction randomized trial
queries.notes: DAPA-HF (31535829), EMPEROR-Reduced (32865377). Prior fixture PMID 34706189 was WRONG (a sotrovimab COVID trial) — corrected 2026-07-02.
